briefdescription.para: Public function and accessed by HttpCache.
Check if the LRU class stores an item with specified key.

simplesect.para: True if the key is found

briefdescription.para: Cleanup the LRU storage and the Memory class.
Remove a data from the LRU class.

simplesect.para: True if the deleted data exist

briefdescription.para: Write/replace an item with specified key.

simplesect.para: True if the key is found

briefdescription.para: Obtain and access the data from LRU class This function will move the data to the 'head' as the latest/recently used data.

parameterdescription.para: If TRUE, does not affect the order.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the data. Nullptr if the data is not found.

briefdescription.para: Check the value only, does not affect the order of the linked list.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the data. Nullptr if the data is not found.

briefdescription.para: Private function needs to be overriden.

detaileddescription.para: LRUFileCache: Cleanup specific file for this key

briefdescription.para: Ensure that we can free up the space before we insert to cache.

memberdef.definition: virtual const FAccelByteCacheWrapper< T > * AccelByte::Core::FAccelByteLRUCache< T >::InsertToCache
memberdef.name: InsertToCache

detaileddescription.para: LRUFileCache: Insert/rewrite to the file directly

briefdescription.para: LRUMemory: Not applicable since memory has nothing to do with persistent storage.

detaileddescription.para: LRUFileCache: Retrieve the file (persistent storage) & set it to ChunkArray

briefdescription.para: Find the index of the ChunkArray based on the storage Key.

simplesect.para: Index number if it exists, otherwise return -1.

memberdef.definition: virtual TDoubleLinkedList< FAccelByteCacheWrapper< T > >::TDoubleLinkedListNode * AccelByte::Core::FAccelByteLRUCache< T >::DLLFindNode
memberdef.name: DLLFindNode

briefdescription.para: Find the pointer of the ChunkDLL's node based on the storage Key.

simplesect.para: Pointer to node if it exists, otherwise return nullptr.
